title: Keto Cherry Cobbler
description: A keto-friendly twist on the classic cherry cobbler, using almond flour and sugar-free sweetener.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together almond flour, granulated sweetener, and a pinch of salt.
Add in melted butter and mix until crumbly.
Press mixture into the bottom of a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together cherry filling and a pinch of salt.
Pour cherry mixture over the crust.
In another bowl, whisk together eggs and a pinch of salt.
Pour egg mixture over the cherry filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
